regions.text: Plants and animals need air. One fifth is oxygen; four fifths is nitrogen. Organisms cannot take nitrogen from the air themselves.
Small organisms in soil and water 'fix' nitrogen into materials plants can use. Animals get nitrogen by eating plants.
Nitrogen returns to soil in animal waste, helping plants grow. soil: earth for plants. fix: make fixed. FUTURE: will fix. PRESENT: fix(es). PAST: fixed.
